meta.name: Get Shop LIVE Products Performance List

document_api_meta.title: Get Shop LIVE Products Performance List
document_api_meta.env_desc: Shop related LIVE session (official account & marketing accounts） Sale performance of each product

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: sort_order
request_query_param.desc:
Sort direction.
Available values: ASC, DESC
Default value: DESC

request_query_param.name: sort_field
request_query_param.desc:
Field to sort on.
Default: gmv
Available values:
- direct_gmv
- items_sold
- customers
- created_sku_orders
- sku_orders
- main_orders
- product_impressions
- produt_clicks

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: request_id
response_param.desc: Request log

response_param.name: data
response_param.desc: Specific return information

response_param.name: ^products
response_param.desc: Overall performance data for the video.

response_param.name: ^^id
response_param.desc: Product id

response_param.name: ^^name
response_param.desc: Product name

response_param.name: ^^sales
response_param.desc: Sales

response_param.name: ^^^direct_gmv
response_param.desc: The total amount paid for orders of this product directly from the LIVE, including returns and refunds.

response_param.name: ^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^^items_sold
response_param.desc: The number of product items sold

response_param.name: ^^^customers
response_param.desc: The total numbers of customers who ordered this product directly from the LIVE, including customers who made returns or refunds.

response_param.name: ^^^created_sku_orders
response_param.desc: The total number of SKU orders created directly from the LIVE for this product.

response_param.name: ^^^avg_price
response_param.desc: Average direct GMV per main order. Also known as AOV (main order)

response_param.name: ^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^^sku_orders
response_param.desc: The total number of paid SKU orders placed directly from the LIVE for this product.

response_param.name: ^^^main_orders
response_param.desc: Total number of paid main orders placed. Main orders refer to the single purchase transaction a customer makes.

response_param.name: ^^^payment_rate
response_param.desc: Main order paid / Main order created of this product

response_param.name: ^^traffic
response_param.desc: Traffic

response_param.name: ^^^product_impressions
response_param.desc: Number of product impressions for this product during the LIVE video, including for product lists and product cards

response_param.name: ^^^ctr
response_param.desc: Click-through rate: The number of product clicks for this product from the LIVE video, divided by the number of product impressions for this product from the LIVE video, including product clicks and product impressions for product lists and product cards

response_param.name: ^^^add_to_cart_count
response_param.desc: The number of times viewers add the product to their cart.

response_param.name: ^^^click_to_order_rate
response_param.desc: Click to order rate

response_param.name: ^^^^sku_order_ctor
response_param.desc: The percentage of times viewers clicked product links in LIVE streams and placed a direct order.

response_param.name: ^^^^main_order_ctor
response_param.desc: Percentage of times viewers who clicked LIVE product links also placed a main order.

response_param.name: ^^^gpm
response_param.desc: GPM

response_param.name: ^^^^watch_gpm
response_param.desc: The Watch GPM is the average GMV generated from 1,000 views of the LIVE.

response_param.name: ^^^produt_clicks
response_param.desc: The total number of times the product was clicked from this LIVE, including from the product list and product card

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: The application will be able to access TikTok shop analytics such as live and video, GMV, orders and content traffic data such as CTR, visitors for a shop and products in shop.
scope_list.auth_info: The application will be able to access your prior and go-forward TikTok Shop sales and traffic data by Shop and product, including but not limited to GMV, Number of orders, units sold, Number of buyers, product listings, product impressions and page views, Number of visitors, and click through rate (CTR), all by content type (video, live and product card).
